'''鈭歾-z-ch-d''' ('''kazazchedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wobble|wobble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wobble|wobble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-z-ch-d
|-
! Lemma
| kazazchedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizazchedoko|thizazchedoko]] || [[word:jizazchedoko|jizazchedoko]] || [[word:shizazchedoko|shizazchedoko]] || [[word:kizazchedoko|kizazchedoko]]

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
